title: Quantum Chaos: Information Scrambling and Complexity
description: Explore the quantum signatures of classical chaos, including level statistics, eigenstate thermalization, and information scrambling. Learn about out-of-time-ordered correlators (OTOCs), the butterfly effect, and quantum complexity.
learningObjectives: Distinguish integrable and chaotic quantum systems using spectral statistics
Analyze information scrambling and the butterfly effect
Understand quantum complexity growth and bounds
Connect quantum chaos to black hole physics
